quests.name: The Petrified Halls
quests.description: The Temple Sector answers to the gorgons now. Break their guard.
dialogueStart: The spirit's temple is real, and the gorgons have made it a nest.
Their soldiers turn men to stone with a glance. Break the guard so I can reach the inner sanctum.
dialogueCompletion: They've taken an acolyte of the old order captive — one who knows the temple's secrets. Free them.

quests.name: The Captured Acolyte
quests.description: Desecrate the gorgon altar, then escort the freed acolyte to safety.

objectives.description: Escort the captured acolyte to safety

dialogueStart: Foul the altar first — it feeds their power. Then the acolyte's cage will weaken.
Get them out alive. They are worth more than a hundred soldiers.
dialogueCompletion: The acolyte lives, and speaks of a heretic who leads the gorgons.
Cut off the head. Find the Heretic and end it.

quests.name: The Gorgon Heretic
quests.description: Hunt the Gorgon Heretics who command the temple.
dialogueStart: The heretics summon serpents without end — strike them before their broods overwhelm you.
Five of them lead the sect. All must fall.
dialogueCompletion: The temple is broken. The gorgons scatter into the wastes.
North now — to Stalgard, where the cold has swallowed an entire people.
